title: Battle.net Scheduled Maintenance for StarCraft Patch 1.18
brief_html: Blizzard will be performing maintenance to the Classic Battle.net servers on Tuesday, March 28, 2017 in preparation for StarCraft: Brood War Remastered (Patch 1.18).
content_html:
Blizzard will be performing maintenance to the Classic Battle.net servers on Tuesday, March 28, 2017 in preparation for StarCraft: Brood War Remastered (Patch 1.18).

Announcement: https://us.battle.net/forums/en/bnet/topic/20753815644

Evening Adventurers,

Battle.net will be down for maintenance on March 28th in preperation for 1.18 Starcraft.
Expected down time: 60 mins

Times:

  • USWest: 0800 PST
  • USEast: 1000 PST
  • Asia: 1200 PST
  • Europe: 1600 PST

Thank you,
Classic Games Team

Additionally, the servers are displaying the following EID_ERROR message upon entry to any channel in preparation for this maintenance:

[Server Broadcast] Server maintenance at 1000 PST (https://us.battle.net/forums/en/bnet/topic/20753815644)
